characters.name: Izz
characters.background: The problematic and rebellious middle child. Saw which way her life was heading — not in a good direction — and viewed a police career as her salvation and a way to erase Grandad's disappointment with most of her life choices. Like Larry, what Gramps thinks of her is an important component of her self esteem.
characters.notes: TBC — director's notes will be added here.

characters.name: Aby
characters.background: The youngest sibling but never got a free pass because of it. She lost her job as an estate agent because she was using the kitchens of the homes she was supposed to be selling to kick-start her home-chef influencer ambitions. She lost her rented flat soon after that. She now lives with Gramps and in between being his main carer she works from home as a customer service rep.
characters.notes: TBC — director's notes will be added here.

characters.name: Larry
characters.background: Criminal solicitor/lawyer. When he started his law career he was newly married, idealistic and optimistic. He admired and looked up to Grandad and the way he was turning kids' lives around as a teacher, and wanted to do something equally important and transformational in the justice system. That was before crippling government cuts to legal aid and the court system made that goal a pipe dream.
characters.notes: TBC — director's notes will be added here.
